Prof. Dr. Shouxin Liu obtained a Ph.D. in Science from Lanzhou University in 2004. In 1984, he at of [...]
Prof. Dr. Shouxin Liu obtained a Ph.D. in Science from Lanzhou University in 2004. In 1984, he taught at the School of Chemistry and Chemical Engineering of Shaanxi Normal University and was promoted to professor in 2006. In 2014, he was awarded the "Teaching Model" by Shaanxi Normal University, one second prize for teaching achievements in Shaanxi Province (second completion person), and one second prize for national teaching achievements (sixth completion person).
